Adjacency Matrix for Conditional Autoregressive Models

Source: R/data.R
adjacency_matrix_car.Rd

A small example adjacency matrix used for fitting Conditional Autoregressive (CAR) random effects.

Usage

adjacency_matrix_car

Format

A binary symmetric \(5 \times 5\) matrix with 1 for adjacent pairs of areas and 0 otherwise.

Source

Simulated.
